**Includes:** wiring layout, work with high voltage (with safety), motors (electrical), transformers, work with switchboards, power systems for buildings and vehicles, electric drives, fault repair.

skills.name: Engineering Design
skills.note: Проектирование устройств, механизмов, систем. От часов до космических кораблей.
skills.vignette: OPI engineer Pirogov designed an exoskeleton for a paralysed operative in fourteen months. Three iterations. The third — works: the operative walks, holds a rifle, fires standing. The exoskeleton's full weight is 14 kg, the battery — 6 hours of work.
skills.desc:
Engineering design: design of mechanical and electromechanical systems. INT + PER + KO.

**Includes:** mechanical design (gears, levers, shafts), pneumatics and hydraulics, design of housings and assemblies, engineering drawing in CAD, prototyping, material selection (steel, aluminium, polymers), modelling and calculations.

skills.name: Nanotechnology
skills.note: Работа на наноуровне. [ВТ] только для высоких ТУ.
skills.vignette: Researcher Vorontsov developed nano-particles capable of binding lead in the body. The first test subject of the OPI on stage-three lead poisoning was healed in eleven days. The technology went into mass production for the workers of the Moscow plant of «old assembly».
skills.desc:
Nanotechnology. **[HT]** — for high-tech worlds. INT.

**Includes:** nano-materials (carbon, silicon, polymer), self-assembling systems, nano-medicine, nano-electronics, design of nano-mechanisms, work with electron microscope and atomic-force microscope, manufacture of nano-products.

skills.name: Biotechnology
skills.note: Генная инженерия, клонирование, синтетическая биология. [ВТ] для высоких ТУ.
skills.vignette: OPI bioengineer Vetrov grew a layer of skin for the operative who had taken second-degree burns on 40% of the body. Time to grow — six weeks. Skin survived transplantation. The operative came back to service in nine months.
skills.desc:
Biotechnology. **[HT]**. INT.

**Includes:** genetic engineering, biomedical engineering, bioinformatics, work with cellular cultures, growing of organs and tissues, biopharmaceuticals (insulin, antibodies), gene therapy.

skills.name: First Aid
skills.note: Перевязка, остановка кровотечения, шинирование, СЛР, противошоковые мероприятия. Может быть у любого — солдата, полицейского, туриста. **Может:** остановить кровотечение, наложить шину, провести СЛР, не дать человеку умереть до приезда врача. **Не может:** диагностировать, назначить лечение, оперировать, определить внутреннее кровотечение. Разница между первой помощью и полевой медициной: первая помощь — «не дай умереть», полевая медицина — «верни в бой».
skills.vignette: When in Moscow a passer-by had a stroke in the street, the only one who didn't get lost in the crowd was the accountant Lena — she had recently done a first-aid course. Lena laid the man on his side, called the ambulance, monitored breathing and pulse for twelve minutes till arrival. The doctor said: «The man owes his life to you. Twelve minutes of correct posture saved his brain.»
skills.desc:
Basic care up to the arrival of paramedics. INT + KO + PER.

**Includes:** assessment of the victim's state, stopping bleeding (tourniquet, pressure bandage, haemostatic), CPR, immobilisation of fractures, first aid in burns, electrical injuries, suffocation, anaphylaxis.

**Specifics:** at low — covers basic injuries. At average — handles a complicated trauma (multiple injuries) for fifteen minutes till the ambulance. At expert — handles an injured for hours.

skills.name: Field Medicine
skills.note: Медицина в боевых и экстремальных условиях. Четыре атрибута — потому что работаешь быстро (СК), точно (КО), под огнём, при плохом освещении, грязными руками. **Может:** извлечь пулю/осколок, зашить рану в поле, провести экстренную трахеотомию, определить пневмоторакс и дренировать, вправить вывих, собрать перелом. **Не может:** провести полостную операцию, лечить хронические заболевания, работать с нейрохирургией. Полевой медик — это человек, который делает страшные вещи кухонным ножом в грязном подвале и спасает жизни. Хирург в стерильной операционной сделает лучше, но хирурга рядом нет, а осколок в лёгком — есть.
skills.vignette: When «Alpha» in the cellar of a shrine had to wait six hours for evacuation with three heavies, the only medic was Kronin — the group's paramedic. Kronin worked six hours without a break: two intravenous infusions on each, two intubations, three pressure-bandages, antibiotics, painkillers, monitoring of consciousness. All three lived. Kronin came out of the cellar wet to the elbow in someone else's blood.
skills.desc:
Help in field conditions, far from a hospital. INT + KO + PER + SP. **Four attributes** — a field medic in the field must decide quickly.

**Includes:** extended first aid, intravenous therapy in the field, oxygenation, intubation in the field, work with traumas (bullet, mine-shrapnel, blunt, burn, thermal), prevention and treatment of infection, prevention of shock, evacuation to a stationary medical facility.

skills.name: Internal Medicine
skills.note: Диагностика, лечение болезней, назначение терапии, ведение пациентов. Врач общей практики. ВО — потому что терапевт должен видеть то, что пациент не говорит: цвет кожи, характер дыхания, походку, зрачки. **Может:** поставить диагноз, назначить лечение, определить, нужна ли операция, вести хронических больных, распознать отравление. **Не может:** оперировать, проводить нейрохирургические вмешательства. Терапевт — это детектив от медицины: его работа — понять что не так. Починить — работа хирурга.
skills.vignette: ORPP doctor Zubova on a routine examination diagnosed a stage-1 pulmonary tuberculosis in operative Voronchuk — by the auscultation and a slight asymmetry on the radiograph. Voronchuk had no complaints. Treatment for six months. Voronchuk returned to duty without consequences.
skills.desc:
Internal medicine: diagnosis and treatment of diseases of internal organs. INT + PER.

**Includes:** general diagnosis (anamnesis, palpation, auscultation, percussion), interpretation of analyses and instrumental examinations (X-ray, ECG, ultrasound, MRI), treatment of common internal diseases (pneumonia, hypertension, gastritis, diabetes), prevention.

skills.name: Surgery
skills.note: Оперативное вмешательство: от аппендэктомии до пересадки органов. ИНТ — знание анатомии и процедур. КО — руки, которые не дрожат. ВО — видеть что делаешь. **Может:** всё, что требует скальпеля, за исключением мозга и нервной системы (это нейрохирургия). **Не может:** работать без оборудования и стерильности (это полевая медицина), диагностировать сложные случаи так же хорошо, как терапевт. В поле хирург без инструментов — дорогой полевой медик.
skills.vignette: Surgeon Lyashchenko of OPI in field conditions stopped the bleeding from a torn iliac artery in operative Kovalyov, sewing the artery on the spot. The operation in the basement, eighteen minutes, without an operating room. Kovalyov lived. Lyashchenko was given a state award for «surgical work in extreme conditions».
skills.desc:
Surgery: surgical intervention. INT + KO + PER + SP.

**Includes:** general surgery (laparotomy, vascular, traumatic), specialised (cardiac, pulmonary), work with surgical instruments, asepsis and antisepsis, stages of operation (access, mobilisation, intervention, restoration, suturing), post-operative care.

skills.name: Neurosurgery
skills.note: Операции на мозге и нервной системе. Высшая медицинская специализация. Только ИНТ и КО — никакая скорость и восприятие не заменят чистое знание и ювелирные руки. **Может:** операции на мозге, спинном мозге, периферической нервной системе. В [ВТ] мирах — работа с нейроимплантами. **Не может:** то, что не относится к нервной системе, нейрохирург делает как обычный хирург, не лучше.
skills.vignette: Neurosurgeon Petrosyan at the OPI extracted a metallic fragment from the brain of operative Levenchuk, two centimetres from the visual cortex. Eleven hours of operation. Levenchuk retained vision in 70% (lost 30% peripheral on the right). Returned to duty in eight months.
skills.desc:
Neurosurgery: surgery on the brain and spinal cord. INT + KO + PER + SP.

**Includes:** craniotomies, removal of tumours, brain trauma, work with the spinal cord, microsurgery, work with the cranial nerves, neuroimaging (CT/MRI), post-operative neurological care.

skills.name: Pharmacology
skills.note: Лекарства, яды, дозировки, взаимодействия, побочные эффекты, синтез. Чистое знание — руки не нужны. **Может:** подобрать лекарство, рассчитать дозу, определить отравление по симптомам, синтезировать препарат (при наличии оборудования), определить неизвестное вещество. **Не может:** лечить руками. Фармаколог знает, что нужно ввести 10 мг морфина, но если у него нет навыка «Первая помощь», он может промахнуться мимо вены.
skills.vignette: OPI pharmacologist Sergeyeva by the symptoms of an unconscious operative recognised barbiturate poisoning, but with an unusual time-course (slow). Suggested a specific synthetic barbiturate of '90s production. The OPI checked: bingo. The antidote was administered, the operative woke in four hours.
skills.desc:
Pharmacology: drugs, dosing, interactions, side effects. INT.

**Includes:** classes of drugs (antibiotics, analgesics, anti-shock, anti-toxic), dosing by weight/age/state, drug interactions, recognition of overdose and poisoning, antidotes (paranormal — separately, see Anti-paranormal Kit).

skills.name: Psychiatry
skills.note: Четыре атрибута — элитный навык. ИНТ — знание. ВО — наблюдательность (читать невербалику). ДУХ — собственная психическая устойчивость (нельзя лечить чужое безумие, если своё трещит). ОБ — умение установить контакт с пациентом, который может быть параноиком, психотиком или манипулятором. **Может:** диагностировать психические расстройства, проводить терапию, гипноз, оценивать вменяемость, противостоять ментальным манипуляциям. **Не может:** лечить физические болезни. В [П] мирах — может быть частичной защитой от телепатии (понимание механизмов внушения).
skills.vignette: ORPP psychiatrist Yakovlev in eight sessions worked out the PTSD of operative Kashirin after the «Black Spring» operation. CBT + medication. Kashirin returned to duty without restrictions. Yakovlev: «Don't break a man with the wrong words. Words work both ways.»
skills.desc:
Psychiatry: mental disorders. INT + PER + SP.

**Includes:** diagnosis of mental illness (schizophrenia, bipolar, PTSD, depression, anxiety disorders), psychopharmacology, psychotherapy (CBT, psychodynamic, EMDR), work with trauma (combat, accident, abuse), forensic psychiatric examination.

skills.name: Microbiology
skills.note: Патогены, вирусы, бактерии, эпидемиология, вакцины, биологическое оружие. **Может:** определить возбудителя, оценить эпидемиологическую угрозу, разработать вакцину (время + оборудование), работать с биологическим оружием. **Не может:** лечить конкретного пациента — это терапия. Микробиолог знает, чем болен город. Терапевт знает, чем болен Иван Петрович.
skills.vignette: OPI microbiologist Konnov by a smear from a wound recognised an antibiotic-resistant Staphylococcus aureus — recommended a substitution of antibiotics in twenty minutes. The patient came back from the brink of sepsis.
skills.desc:
Microbiology: bacteria, viruses, fungi, parasites. INT.

**Includes:** microscopy, isolation of cultures, identification of pathogens, antibiogram, virology (basics), parasitology (worms, ectoparasites), microbiological diagnosis of infectious diseases.

skills.name: Implantology
skills.note: [ВТ] Установка, настройка, обслуживание и удаление имплантов: от кардиостимулятора до нейроимпланта «Цереброн». Гибрид хирургии и электроники. **Может:** имплантировать, калибровать, диагностировать сбои импланта, удалить. **Не может:** разработать новый имплант (это инженерное конструирование + биотехнологии). Имплантолог — это хирург для киборгов.
skills.vignette: OPI implantologist Vrubov installed a special neural implant on an operative who had lost a hand at the shoulder. The implant connects the brain's motor cortex directly with the prosthetic. The operative learned to use it in three months. Now he holds a rifle, fires, reloads — as if the hand were his own.
skills.desc:
Implantology. **[HT]**. INT + KO. Installation of mechanical and electronic implants in the human body.

**Includes:** orthopaedic implants (joints, bones), cardiovascular (pacemaker, stent), neural (deep brain stimulation, cochlear), prostheses with feedback, special (OPI-cybernetics).

skills.name: Blacksmithing
skills.note: Ковка оружия, брони, инструментов. Сила для молота, КО для точности, ИНТ для знания материалов.
skills.vignette: Blacksmith Velimir worked in his Podmoskovye smithy for forty years. When the OPI ordered from him twelve aspen stakes with silver points and cold-iron sleeves, Velimir made them in eleven days. The work was inspected by the OPI engineer with a microscope: structure of the steel — uniform, the silver fused with the iron at exactly the right temperature without inclusions. «Master,» said the engineer. «You are a master.» Velimir shrugged. «Forty years. By touch.»
skills.desc:
Working metal on the anvil. SR + KO + INT.

**Includes:** forging, hardening, annealing, hot and cold work, making tools, weapons and armour at the basic level, restoration of old works, work with steel/iron/bronze/copper, knowledge of alloys and their properties, work with cold iron for the unholy.

skills.name: Gunsmithing
skills.note: Обслуживание, модификация и изготовление огнестрельного оружия.
skills.vignette: Gunsmith Zharkov in a workshop near Tula restored a German sniper rifle from 1944 — found in the development of a shrine where a German sniper-hunter had hidden during the war. Three months of work. The rifle began to shoot to 0.4 MOA. Zharkov said: «Old weapons live longer than men. If you handle it right.»
skills.desc:
Production and repair of firearms and edged weapons. INT + KO + PER.

**Includes:** design of weapons, manufacture of main components (barrel, bolt, trigger group), assembly, calibration, cleaning and care, repair of jams, gunsmithing modifications.

skills.name: Armorsmithing
skills.note: Изготовление и ремонт доспехов.
skills.vignette: Armourer Gerhardt of OPI repaired the combat suit of operative Korovina, who had taken a shot of 7.62 from short range and survived only thanks to the suit. Korovina watched as Gerhardt cut out the damaged section and inserted a new one in nine hours of work. «It will hold a 7.62 again?» — «Now,» said Gerhardt, «it will hold .50 BMG. With reservations.»
skills.desc:
Production of armour. SR + KO + INT.

**Includes:** chain mail, plate, modern composite, ballistic plates, riveting and welding of plate, anatomy of an armour, fit on a body, work with non-standard sizes and against unusual threats (cold iron, silver).

skills.name: Cooking
skills.note: Приготовление пищи. ВО — обоняние и вкус. Да, это навык. Отравить тоже навык.
skills.vignette: Master cook Bagrationov fed the «Alpha» squad during a sixteen-hour wait in a field stop. Field kitchen, three pots, no proper supply. Borscht, kasha with stew, tea. The squad in three sessions ate everything and asked for seconds. Bagrationov: «To feed eight men under fire is harder than to make a banquet for forty in a restaurant.»
skills.desc:
Cooking. INT + PER + CH.

**Includes:** classic culinary techniques (boiling, frying, baking, sauces), national cuisines, work with limited ingredients (field cuisine, ration cuisine), food safety, presentation, paranormal-related (knowledge that water for the unholy must be boiled in an eggshell — see Folklore).

skills.name: Alchemy
skills.note: Зелья, эликсиры, трансмутация. Если мастер включает магический модуль.
skills.vignette: Old alchemist Pyotr Filippovich Khramtsov in a wooden house in Yaroslavl oblast prepared «liver tea» according to a recipe of XVII century — for a child with a paranormal poisoning brought from Moscow. The OPI couldn't help: a modern medicine didn't work. Khramtsov took eleven hours. The child started recovering on the eighteenth hour. «It is not chemistry,» Khramtsov said. «It is patience.»
skills.desc:
Alchemy. INT + PER + SP. **[F]** for fantasy worlds — or — practical for modern (pharmacology + ritual).

**Includes:** preparation of potions and tinctures, work with rare ingredients (mandrake, hellebore, paranormal substances), basic transmutation (small steps), distillation, extraction, work according to old recipes, recognition of compounds.

skills.name: Diplomacy
skills.note: Переговоры, компромиссы, союзы, торговые соглашения. Рациональное убеждение: ты предлагаешь решение, выгодное обеим сторонам. ИНТ — потому что нужно понимать интересы собеседника. ОБ — подача. ДУХ — стержень: хороший дипломат не прогибается под давлением. **Когда использовать:** переговоры с равными или сильнейшими, заключение сделок, предотвращение конфликтов, установление союзов. **Не работает:** когда собеседнику нечего терять или он иррационален.
skills.vignette: When between two criminal groups in Moscow a dispute arose over a district, and both sides were preparing for a shoot-out, ORPP negotiator Kalinina met with both — separately and together — over three weeks. Found common ground: both sides lost from the war more than they would gain. Proposed a compromise on territorial division. Both sides signed. No shoot-out. Three weeks of negotiation saved 18 lives by the OPI's later estimate.
skills.desc:
Negotiation, finding compromise, mediation. INT + CH + SP.

**Includes:** analysis of stakeholders, separating interests from positions, finding common ground, mediation in conflict, protocol and etiquette of high meetings, work with interpreters and cross-cultural communication.

skills.name: Oratory
skills.note: Публичные выступления, проповеди, пропаганда, мотивационные речи, агитация. Отличается от дипломатии: дипломатия — один на один, красноречие — один перед многими. ДУХ доминирует — толпу ведёт тот, кто горит. **Когда использовать:** поднять боевой дух перед боем, убедить горожан открыть ворота, провести предвыборную речь, обратить в свою веру. **Не работает:** в тихой беседе один на один — там дипломатия.
skills.vignette: When General Serov came out before the troops after a defeat in which two hundred fighters had fallen, and the morale had to be raised, Serov did not speak in pathetic words. He stood, looked at the men, said: «Two hundred ours. By name I do not have the strength to read. The Living Memorial will be made. But the war does not wait. Two days. Then we go again. I am with you.» The silence stood five seconds. Then someone in the back said «Hurrah» — quietly. The others picked it up. Loudly. Serov knew: he had raised them.
skills.desc:
Public speaking, oratorical art. SP + CH + INT. Differs from Diplomacy: diplomacy is a talk with one whose interests you must understand; oratory is a speech to a crowd, whose hearts you must ignite.

**Includes:** rhetoric, structure of speech (intro, body, climax, ending), work with the audience, voice (timbre, pace, volume), gesture, knowing what the audience needs in different states (fear, anger, hope, doubt).

skills.name: Seduction
skills.note: Очарование, соблазнение, манипуляция через привлекательность и эмоциональную связь. ДУХ — потому что настоящее обольщение требует внутренней силы и уверенности, а не только красивого лица. **Когда использовать:** получить информацию от стражника, войти в доверие к цели, отвлечь внимание. **Не работает:** против тех, кто к вам физически/культурно нечувствителен, и против проницательных — они видят манипуляцию. Модификатор Сексапильности (достоинство) добавляется к этому навыку.
skills.vignette: Interrogator Roshchina sat opposite the suspect, set a cup of coffee on his side of the table — "is yours warmer than mine" — leaned forward by half a centimetre. The suspect, twice convicted of armed robbery, told her everything in two hours. Not because she had threatened. Because she had been more interesting than freedom.
skills.desc:
Seduction. CH + SP.

**Includes:** social charm, body language and presentation, conversation skills, reading the partner (interest, defence, openness), use of the personal field of attraction, fine line between flirting and inappropriate.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.note: Прямое давление через угрозу насилия. СЛ в формуле — потому что «я тебя убью» от щуплого интеллектуала звучит иначе, чем от двухметрового самбиста. Угроза должна быть подкреплена. **Когда использовать:** допрос пленного, устрашение противника перед боем, заставить бандита заговорить. **Не работает:** против тех, кто сильнее вас (контр-проверка по СЛ+ДУХ), и против фанатиков (высокий ДУХ).
skills.vignette: Captain Shchur did not raise his voice. Did not gesture. Did not threaten. Stood opposite the suspect, two metres tall, with a scar from temple to chin, and said in his ordinary tone: «You will answer in fifteen minutes. Or in five hours after a meeting with my colleague Bernard. The choice is yours.» Bernard did not exist. The suspect spoke in twelve minutes.
skills.desc:
Intimidation, presence, pressure. SR + CH + SP.

**Includes:** physical presence and stance, voice (low, slow, with weight), eye contact, demonstration of capability without action, knowing where the opponent's weak point is (family, freedom, money, fear), restraint of one's own force in front of the appearance.

skills.name: Bargaining
skills.note: Купля-продажа, оценка товаров, торг, понимание рынка, определение подделок. ВО — чтение контрагента: нервничает ли продавец? Врёт ли про качество? **Когда использовать:** покупка снаряжения, продажа добычи, оценка артефакта, понимание экономической ситуации в городе. **Отличается от дипломатии:** торговля — про деньги и вещи, дипломатия — про политику и отношения.
skills.vignette: OPI procurement officer Bogdanov bargained the price of three off-road vehicles with the Tigr factory by 18% — by hinting at an alternative order through MoD channels. The factory understood the hint and agreed. Three Tigr-2330s came into the ORPP at the lower price.
skills.desc:
Bargaining. CH + INT.

**Includes:** assessment of the value of goods and services, bargaining (skill of moving the price), reading the partner's intent (he needs to sell more than I need to buy or vice versa), knowledge of markets and prices, smooth speech, escaping a dead end, deal-closing.

skills.name: Etiquette
skills.note: Знание правил поведения: от королевского двора до корпоративного приёма, от чайной церемонии до воровской малины. Каждая социальная среда имеет свои правила — этикет позволяет не облажаться. **Когда использовать:** первое появление в незнакомом обществе, приём у аристократа, переговоры с чужой культурой. Высокий уровень позволяет интуитивно считывать правила даже незнакомой среды.
skills.vignette: ORPP operative Polyakov at a reception of a foreign ambassador knew at which moment to take the proffered drink, at which moment to put it down, at which moment to address whom, at which moment to step aside. The ambassador said: «Your people understand. With them one can speak.» So began the eight-month cooperation.
skills.desc:
Etiquette and protocol — knowledge of the rules for various circles.

**Includes:** secular etiquette (greeting, address, table, dance), business etiquette (negotiations, gifts, business cards), national differences (Asia, Arab world, Europe), etiquette of the criminal world (where applicable), religious etiquette (church, mosque, synagogue, temple).

skills.name: Bluff
skills.note: Ложь, покерфейс, хладнокровное враньё на голубом глазу. ДУХ — не столько моральная устойчивость, сколько внутренний стержень: чтобы врать убедительно, нужно не бояться разоблачения. **Когда использовать:** любая ситуация, где нужно убедительно соврать. От «у меня есть пропуск» до «я понятия не имею, кто убил барона». **Контр-навык:** Проницательность. Спор блефа и проницательности — ключевое социальное противостояние.
skills.vignette: Investigator Smolny entered the cult's safe-house under cover, identified himself as a buyer of «special goods». Three hours of conversation. Made out he had been on the market five years, knew names, knew prices, knew rituals. Came out with the inventory of the stockroom, a roster of buyers, and the timetable for the delivery. Smolny had been on this case eight months. Cover was perfect.
skills.desc:
Bluff. CH + SP.

**Includes:** convincing lying with body language, holding the line under questioning, false leads, false documents (orally), fluid switching of legend, work without preparation.

skills.name: Insight
skills.note: Чтение людей, распознавание лжи, оценка истинных намерений. Три атрибута: ДУХ — доверяешь ли своей интуиции. ИНТ — анализируешь ли сказанное логически. ВО — видишь ли микровыражения, дрожь рук, бегающие глаза. **Контр-навык** к блефу, обольщению, дипломатии, запугиванию — ко всему, где вас пытаются убедить в том, что не является правдой. Без проницательности в группе — группу обведут вокруг пальца. **Важно:** проницательность не читает мысли. Она говорит «он врёт» — но не говорит «что именно скрывает». Для этого нужен допрос.
skills.vignette: Interrogator Roshchina by the third question knew the suspect was lying about an alibi. The pupils dilated slightly on the third question; the breathing held by a third of a second. Roshchina did not call out the lie — kept on the line. By the eleventh question the suspect was confused in details that should have been straightforward. By the fifteenth — confessed.
skills.desc:
Insight, lie-detection, reading state. PER + INT + SP.

**Includes:** microexpressions of the face (Ekman), body language, voice tone shift under lying, cognitive load on lying (delays in speech), behavioural baseline, deviations from it, reading emotional state, recognising imminent action (a knife in a pocket, a moment of impending attack).

skills.name: Interrogation
skills.note: Извлечение информации. Может быть мягким (беседа, расположение к себе, «мы просто разговариваем») или жёстким (давление, угрозы, манипуляция страхом). ОБ — для мягкого допроса: умение расположить к себе. ВО — для чтения реакций допрашиваемого. ДУХ — для жёсткого: давление без потери контроля. **Отличается от запугивания:** запугивание — «делай что говорю». Допрос — «скажи что знаешь». Разные цели, разная техника. Можно допрашивать без угроз. Можно запугать без допроса.
skills.vignette: ORPP investigator Kashirin worked with a captive cultist for eleven hours without sleep. No physical pressure. Just questions, in shifts, in different intonations, with the same details from different sides. By the eleventh hour the cultist had confessed to seventeen ritual murders, to the structure of the cult, to the names of the patrons. Kashirin: «The truth is in the dial. Eleven hours — the dial wears out, the truth surfaces.»
skills.desc:
Interrogation — extraction of information from a subject.

**Includes:** various techniques (Reid, PEACE, classic confrontation), psychological pressure within the legal framework, working with a person under stress (preserving information), spotting lies and contradictions, working with witnesses and victims (carefully), recognising broken testimony (the lie is too well-prepared).

skills.name: Stealth
skills.note: Бесшумное перемещение, прятание, незаметность. Отличается от Маскировки — это активное движение, а не статичная позиция.
skills.vignette: Operative Tenin walked the corridor of the mafia boss's mansion past two guards, within three metres of each. The guards did not turn their heads. Tenin was not hiding behind cover. He simply moved in the rhythm of the corridor — at the pace of the air-conditioner blower. The guards were used to this rhythm; their hearing did not pick out Tenin's footsteps against it. He passed them, set the bug, came back the same way. The guards did not notice.
skills.desc:
Stealthy movement and hiding of presence. SP + KO + PER.

**Includes:** silent walking, use of cover and shadow, control of one's silhouette, calculation of observers' lines of sight, movement in low light, hiding the smell and sound of equipment, work with surveillance cameras (where to stand to be invisible), urban camouflage.

skills.name: Theft
skills.note: Карманная кража, срезание кошельков, мелкая кража на глазах у жертвы.
skills.vignette: Pickpocket Yura in Prague worked a thousand people a day and was not caught once in eighteen years. Not a «window-thief» — a pickpocket. From a crowd on the Charles Bridge in the morning to the back-streets of Wenceslas Square in the afternoon. Yura was a thief in three generations. ORPP, when they came for him at the Czech police's request, was offered a deal: tell us how you do it. Yura told. ORPP got an excellent training for surveillance operatives.
skills.desc:
Theft without breaking and entering: pickpocketing, household, fine hand-work. SP + KO + PER.

**Includes:** pickpocketing, theft from open bags and pockets, «window-thief» methods through distraction, dexterity, removal of small objects under observation (the magician's «pass»), team-work (a distractor and a lifter).

skills.name: Lockpicking
skills.note: Механические замки, отмычки, сейфы.
skills.vignette: Locksmith Andronov in twelve seconds opened a Mossler home safe by ear. The OPI brought the safe with money for the cult — a sealed safe was a problem; it had to be opened without traces of breaking. Andronov sat at the safe, turned the dial slowly, listening to the clicks of the gates. Twelve seconds — and the safe opened. The money went into evidence. The safe went back to the cult untouched.
skills.desc:
Lockpicking. PER + KO + SP.

**Includes:** padlocks (pick and tension), mortise locks (regular and complex), code locks (by ear and by wear), classic-cracker safe-work, work with picks, bumping technique, decoding tools, knowledge of lock-internals.

skills.name: Electronic Bypass
skills.note: Электронные замки, сигнализации, камеры. [ВТ]
skills.vignette: OPI technician Vladislav Bobylyov bypassed the security system of a private museum on Rublyovka in nineteen minutes. Card cloner on the reader, alarm — silenced via the network, cameras — looped two minutes of stable footage. The team entered, took the cultic artefact, came out. The owner discovered the loss next morning. The cameras showed a normal night.
skills.desc:
Bypass of electronic security systems. INT + PER + KO.

**Includes:** electronic locks (card, biometric, mechanical-electronic), alarms (motion sensors, perimeter, IR), card readers and their cloning, CCTV (looping, masking), basic understanding of network security to interrupt linked systems.

skills.name: Traps
skills.note: Установка и обезвреживание. От растяжки до сложного механизма.
skills.vignette: Combat engineer Lavrov went through the cultic mansion ahead of the storming group — looking for traps. Found six. The seventh — found him. A trip-cord at thigh height across the doorway, attached to a fragmentation grenade. Lavrov noticed the cord 0.4 seconds before he would have crossed it. Stopped. Disarmed. Said in the radio: «Watch the cords. They are not at the floor here.» The squad came in carefully.
skills.desc:
Traps — setting and disarming. INT + PER + KO.

**Includes:** mechanical (snares, snags, deadfalls), explosive (mines, IEDs), electronic, ritual (paranormal — separately), recognition of placed traps in a building, disarming, setting of own traps for ambush.

skills.name: Demolitions
skills.note: Изготовление, установка, обезвреживание взрывных устройств. Четыре атрибута — одна ошибка и тебя нет.
skills.vignette: Combat engineer Kazarinov of «Delta» placed five focused charges on the supports of the cult's prayer-house ceiling. Two C-4 charges of 250 g each at four supports, one half-kilo on the central one. Detonation sequence — central first, then the four corners in 0.4 seconds. The roof fell on itself. The cult was buried. The neighbouring buildings — intact.
skills.desc:
Demolitions. INT + KO + PER + SP.

**Includes:** explosives (TNT, RDX, plastic, ammonal), detonators (electric, pyrotechnic, radio, time), placement of charges (focused, distributed, fragmentation), demolition of structures (doors, walls, columns, supports), shaped charges (anti-tank), mine clearance (anti-personnel, anti-tank), counter-explosive search.

skills.name: Surveillance
skills.note: Наблюдение за объектом. ОБ — способность не привлекать внимание. ДУХ — терпение.
skills.vignette: OPI surveillance officer Sergeyenko followed a suspect three days through three cities. Lost the suspect three times — and three times found him again, anticipating the next move. The suspect was a professional, an instructor of his service. Sergeyenko was three steps better. On the fourth day, the suspect realised he had been followed all three days. ORPP got the suspect's full route, contacts, and the safe-house in Krasnodar.
skills.desc:
Surveillance — observation and tailing.

**Includes:** static surveillance (post, vehicle), mobile tailing (foot, vehicle), group tailing (multiple agents, rotation), counter-surveillance, evasion of one's own tail, working with surveillance equipment (cameras, bugs, tracker).

skills.name: Disguise
skills.note: Изменение внешности. ВО — оценка результата.
skills.vignette: OPI grease-paint artist Kozyrev transformed operative Yashin from a 28-year-old man into a 70-year-old «retired engineer» in 3 hours. Prosthetic cheeks, age makeup of hands, grey wig, glasses, walking stick. Yashin came to the meeting with the cult's recruiter. The recruiter saw a sad old man, talked freely. By the end of the meeting Yashin had the full list of the cult's «special collection».
skills.desc:
Disguise — change of appearance with grease-paint, prosthetics, costume. INT + KO + CH.

**Includes:** classical theatrical grease-paint, prosthetic noses/cheeks/chin, change of hair colour and style, wigs, age makeup (younger / older), masking of scars and tattoos, voice change (additional skill — Acting), gait change.

skills.name: Forgery
skills.note: Создание фальшивых документов, подписей, печатей.
skills.vignette: OPI forger Plotnikov made a passport for operative Krylov under another name in eight hours. Real paper, real photograph, real holograms, real stamps. Krylov went under cover for six months as a different person. The cover held to the end.
skills.desc:
Forgery of documents. INT + KO + PER.

**Includes:** copy of passports, IDs, certificates, contracts, work with watermarks and seals, knowledge of security features (hologram, microtext, UV), making old documents (work with paper and ink for aging), digital forgery (PDF, photo).

skills.name: Poisons
skills.note: Знание и применение ядов. Отдельно от фармакологии — это специфическое, целенаправленно деструктивное знание.
skills.vignette: Old Cossack Mikhail Bogdanov knew thirty-two herbal poisons by name and could identify them in a field meadow at a glance. ORPP got from him a list of plant antidotes used by the Cossack tradition. Two of these — actually worked against modern toxins. The pharmacology lab is reproducing them now.
skills.desc:
Poisons — preparation, application, recognition. INT.

**Includes:** plant poisons (hellebore, hemlock, monkshood), animal poisons (snakes, frogs, fish), mineral (arsenic, mercury), synthetic (cyanide, ricin), preparation of poisons in field conditions, application (food, drink, contact, dart), recognition of poisoning by symptoms, antidotes.

skills.name: Athletics (running/jumping)
skills.note: Бег, прыжки, спринт.
skills.vignette: When «Beta» had to chase a runner across the rooftops of a housing block in Biryulyovo, the only one who caught him was Turov — a former long-distance runner. Six roofs, three drops with safe landings, two jumps. Turov caught the runner on the seventh roof, in a regular flying tackle. They both rolled along the roof to the parapet. Turov held the runner by the harness with one hand and held the parapet with the other. The squad came up in two minutes.
skills.desc:
Athletics: running, jumping, throwing. KO + SP.

**Includes:** sprint and stayer, jumps (long, high, triple), throws (hammer, discus, javelin), hurdles, parkour, general running endurance, jumping over obstacles.

skills.name: Weightlifting
skills.note: Подъём тяжестей, силовые упражнения.
skills.vignette: When «Alpha» was stuck under rubble in the basement of an industrial estate and had to lift a concrete slab to get a wounded man out, the only one who actually did it was Sergeant Pavlov — master of sport in weight-lifting. Pavlov lifted 600 kg of slab for 12 seconds on his shoulders. The wounded was dragged out by the squad in those 12 seconds. Pavlov dropped the slab and sat down. Three weeks of recovery. Came back.
skills.desc:
Weight-lifting and power exercises. SR + TOUGH.

**Includes:** deadlift, squat, bench press, snatch and clean (classic Olympic), powerlifting, strongman events (atlas-stones, log-press, yoke).

skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.note: Кувырки, сальто, паркур, балансирование.
skills.vignette: Operative Stepashina, former gymnast, took a roll from a moving van at 40 km/h, hit the asphalt and rolled out without injury. Got up — and ran the alley, gun out. The squad's commander on the radio: «How are you not killed?» — «Acrobatics is a school of falling, not jumping,» said Stepashina. «You can land on anything.»
skills.desc:
Acrobatics and gymnastics. KO + SP.

**Includes:** rolls, somersaults, handstands, work on the bar/parallel bars/rings (gymnastics), parkour with acrobatic elements, falls without injury (judo school), aerial gymnastics (rope, silk), circus acrobatics.

skills.name: Parachuting
skills.note: Дух — потому что надо прыгнуть.
skills.vignette: ORPP airborne specialist Yermilov took a HAHO jump from 8000 m at night over forest in Tver oblast. Time under canopy 32 minutes, 14 km of horizontal travel. Landing in a 30-metre clearing in pitch dark. Twigs from the spruce skimmed the canopy on landing. Yermilov landed on his feet, gathered the canopy in 90 seconds, set off to the rendezvous point on foot.
skills.desc:
Parachuting. KO + SP + SP.

**Includes:** static-line jumping, free-fall (manual deployment), high-altitude (HALO/HAHO), tactical landing on terrain, wind-and-altitude calculation, work with the gear (D-1-5U, D-6, special), formation jumping, jumping into water.

skills.name: Music: instrument
skills.note: Каждый инструмент — отдельный навык (гитара, фортепиано, скрипка и т.д.).
skills.vignette: When the mystic Somov played the violin at home in Moscow, no one understood why he did it. Somov played Bach — not very technically, but with feeling. Neighbours: nice. But once Somov played «Chaconne d-moll» from a partita in a flat where there was suspicion of a haunting. The haunting tried to manifest — and faded mid-manifestation. Somov: «Music is not entertainment. It is a barrier.»
skills.desc:
Playing a musical instrument. KO + SP + SP. **Each instrument / family is a separate specialisation.**

**Includes:** mastering the instrument, sight-reading, improvisation, ensemble work, repertoire, knowledge of music theory.

skills.name: Singing
skills.note: Вокал. Один навык, без деления на жанры — жанр определяется репертуаром, а не механикой.
skills.vignette: At a monastery near Moscow where «something» was happening, Father Anthony asked for reinforcement — a good singer. They sent operative Krasnov with a trained baritone. Krasnov sang akathist with Father Anthony for two hours. The «something» faded. Krasnov said: «I didn't think singing was a working skill.» Father Anthony said: «It is one of the oldest working skills there is.»
skills.desc:
Vocal art. SP + CH.

**Includes:** academic vocal, pop, folk, church (chant, akathist), improvisation and canonical work, ensemble singing, voice control under stress, projection across a hall without amplification.

skills.name: Painting
skills.note: Четыре атрибута: знание, руки, глаз, душа.
skills.vignette: Artist Kalinkina of OPI restored an icon from XVIII century which had become a cult-anchor. Restoration as a counter-ritual. Eight months of work. The icon began to «work» again — the haunting at the monastery where it had stood for 250 years died down. Kalinkina: «Painting is not entertainment. It is a function.»
skills.desc:
Painting. KO + INT + CH.

**Includes:** drawing (pencil, charcoal, sanguine), painting (oil, watercolour, tempera, acrylic), composition, work with anatomy, perspective, light, ritual painting (icons, mandalas, paranormal-bound — separately).

skills.name: Acting
skills.note: Перевоплощение, убедительная игра. ВО — чтение аудитории.
skills.vignette: OPI operative under deep cover Solovyova played the role of a wife of a high-ranking cultist for two years. Every day. Twenty-four seven. No breaks. Even at home, on her own, she did not break the role — in case of bugs. Two years. The cult was destroyed. Solovyova came out with a Stanislavsky-quality performance. The first three months after the operation she had to be brought back to herself through psychiatry.
skills.desc:
Acting craft. CH + SP + INT.

**Includes:** schools (Stanislavsky, Meisner, Strasberg), inhabiting a role, voice and speech, plasticity, work with text, improvisation, stage and film acting, work in cover (legend, behaviour, emotion).

skills.name: Journalism
skills.note: Сбор, анализ и подача информации.
skills.vignette: OPI consultant journalist Volynsky uncovered the cult of «Children of the Underworld» through a two-year investigation in the press. Eighteen articles, three documentary films, one book. The cult was exposed publicly — and after that the ORPP could move openly. Without Volynsky's groundwork the operation would have been politically impossible.
skills.desc:
Journalism. INT + SP + PER.

**Includes:** investigative reporting, interview techniques, source verification, writing under deadline, fact-checking, working with archives, photo-journalism (basics), media law.

skills.name: Photography / Video
skills.note: Композиция, свет, момент. [ВТ] для цифровых технологий.
skills.vignette: OPI surveillance photographer Vorobyov shot a confidential meeting of the cult's patron with an undefined contact at 200 metres through a window of a high-floor flat opposite. 600 mm lens, ISO 800, manual focus. Twelve frames in two minutes. Three of them — clear. The patron was identified.
skills.desc:
Photography and video. KO + PER + INT.

**Includes:** technical (camera, lens, exposure, focus), composition, light, mobile work (paparazzi, surveillance), event reporting, post-processing, video (camera, montage, sound).

skills.name: Fortification
skills.note: Строительство и разрушение укреплений. От окопа до крепости.
skills.vignette: When «Alpha» had to entrench at a border facility until reinforcement arrival (three hours), the fortifier Karkayev in thirty minutes transformed the ordinary fence into a battle line: sandbags from the storehouse, fire-positions in two echelons, barbed wire on improvised stakes, observation post on the roof. The cultists came twice. Both times — pushed back.
skills.desc:
Field fortification and engineering equipment of positions. INT + KO + SR.

**Includes:** trench and dugout building, sandbags and barricades, camouflage of positions, fire-sectors and observation, anti-tank obstacles, mining (with Demolitions), water-line for the unit, building defensive system for an outpost.

skills.name: Construction
skills.note: Гражданское строительство: дома, мосты, дороги. Отличается от фортификации целью.
skills.vignette: When the OPI needed to equip a secret research base under an industrial estate near Moscow, foreman Gonchar personally led the works for eight months. He did not «build» — he turned a basement into a laboratory: ventilation with separate filters for each room, electrical wiring on three separate circuits (regular, backup, emergency), water with a filtration system for paranormal pollutants, walls with electromagnetic insulation. The base was operating for fifteen years before it was decommissioned. Gonchar: «Build for the long term. Build for the strange.»
skills.desc:
Civilian and industrial building. INT + KO + SR. Differs from Fortification: fortification is for defence; building is for creating buildings and infrastructure.

**Includes:** reading and drafting of construction documentation, work with materials (concrete, brick, wood, metal), foundation, walls, roofs, engineering systems (water, sewage, electricity, heating), interior work, knowledge of building codes.

skills.name: Combat Engineering
skills.note: Минирование и разминирование. Отличается от взрывотехники тем, что это про полевую работу под огнём, а не про лабораторную сборку.
skills.vignette: Combat engineer Krylov of «Delta» mined the approach to the cultic compound for the night before the storming. Eight POM-2R mines on the perimeter, two MON-50 in the alleys. Mine clearance — at the storming's signal. Krylov did the mine clearance personally, in 14 minutes. The squad came in across his cleared corridor.
skills.desc:
Combat engineering — mines, traps, breaching.

**Includes:** mining (anti-personnel, anti-tank, controlled), mine clearance (manual, technical, dog), breach charges, water and obstacle crossings (improvised bridges, lifelines), camouflage of engineering work, work with engineering machines (excavator, bulldozer).

skills.name: Psychokinesis
skills.note: Перемещение предметов усилием воли.
skills.vignette: When «Alpha» entered the cultists' den, and operative Yermakov, a psionic-psychokinetic, saw a cultist with a sickle behind his partner, Yermakov had half a second. Without weapons in his hands — Yermakov shot psychokinetically. A glass bottle from the table flew across the room and hit the cultist on the back of the head. The cultist fell. The partner turned around and saw the bottle. «Was that you?» he asked. Yermakov: «Yes.» — «Thanks.»
skills.desc:
Movement of matter by force of will. **[P]** — only for worlds with psionics. INT + SP + PER.

**Includes:** telekinesis (moving objects), psychokinetic push (directed strike), holding (stationary fixation), small fine work (lockpick from a distance), tossing of an object as a weapon (a stone, a knife, a chair).

skills.name: Pyrokinesis
skills.note: Изменение температуры объектов.
skills.vignette: An operative bursts into the basement where cultists are trying to summon an Ancient God. Alone. On the altar — his partner, stripped and painted with ochre and henna in known signs. Around — eighteen cultists, finishing the words. The operative does not raise the GSh-18. Raises his right hand and exhales a thread of flame from his fingertips — a hand-width thick, a forearm in length. The cultists ignite one by one — like candles in a row. Sixty seconds. Twenty bodies. No Ancient God.
skills.desc:
Control of fire and temperature through will. **[P]**. INT + SP + PER.

**Includes:** ignition (without a source of flame), bursts of flame (directed fire), thermal localisation (raising the temperature of a point), heat shielding (slowing the spread of fire), control of an existing fire (turn, stop, intensify).

skills.name: Telepathy
skills.note: Чтение мыслей, передача мыслей, ментальные атаки.
skills.vignette: OPI telepath Sheremetyeva read the captured cultist for 18 minutes. Not interrogation — direct reading. The cultist felt nothing. By the end of 18 minutes Sheremetyeva had: the cult's full hierarchy, locations of three other cells, names of the patrons, schedule of next ritual. «Thank you,» she said to the cultist in his cell. «You don't even need to talk.»
skills.desc:
Telepathy. **[P]**. INT + SP + CH.

**Includes:** mental reading (surface thoughts), deep reading (memories, hidden), mental projection (sending a thought), telepathic communication with another psionic, blocking of one's own thoughts (against another telepath), reading of emotions (passive), recognition of psionic presence.

skills.name: Extrasensory Perception
skills.note: Расширенное восприятие: ауры, аномалии, скрытые объекты.
skills.vignette: OPI extrasense Vereshchagin in a flat in Moscow felt at a distance the presence of a vampire den three kilometres away. Pointed at the map: «Here. Three vampires, one ancient. Den under a former cellar. Entrance through Krasnokursantsky Lane, second courtyard, basement door behind a green van.» ORPP came at night. The den was exactly there. Three vampires, one ancient. Destroyed.
skills.desc:
Extrasensory perception. **[P]**. PER + SP + INT.

**Includes:** clairvoyance (vision of the distant or hidden), clairaudience, premonition (intuitive flashes of the future), aura-reading, sensing the presence of the unholy at distance, dowsing (water, metal, paranormal anchors).

skills.name: Biokinetics
skills.note: Управление биологическими процессами. Лечение и убийство.
skills.vignette: OPI biokinetic Sheremetyeva (different Sheremetyeva — the healer-Sheremetyeva, partner of Serov in «Gamma») in the basement of a cultic compound healed operative Volkov of a torn liver in 14 minutes. Volkov should have died of internal haemorrhage. Sheremetyeva put her hands on the abdomen, closed her eyes, breathed deeply. The bleeding stopped. The tissue began to gather. Volkov lived. Sheremetyeva sweated through three shirts.
skills.desc:
Biokinetics — manipulation of biological tissue. **[P]**. INT + KO + SP.

**Includes:** healing (acceleration of regeneration), wound closure (sealing of vessels, sewing of tissues by will), pain relief, manipulation of one's own body (changes in adrenaline, change of body temperature for half an hour), in extreme — manipulation of an opponent's body (a heart stop — a war crime in any system).

skills.name: Psycho-Temporal Control
skills.note: Манипуляция временем. Высшая форма.
skills.vignette: OPI psycho-temporal Mikhalkov sensed a fae glade in a Tver forest 200 metres before he stepped into it. «Don't go in,» he said to the group. «Time goes wrong there. We'll come out in three years if we get in now.» The group went round. The OPI later sent a research expedition with a chronometer. Mikhalkov was right. The time anomaly was confirmed.
skills.desc:
Psycho-temporal control. **[P]** — rare ability. INT + SP.

**Includes:** subjective time-slowing (the carrier feels time slower — reactions faster), foresight (instantaneous flash of the next 1–3 seconds), short jumps backward (a few seconds — at extreme cost), sensing of «time-anomalies» (where time flows differently — a fae glade, a haunted manor).

skills.name: Matter Control
skills.note: Разрушение и перестроение атомарной структуры. Высшая форма.
skills.vignette: OPI matter-controller Verbitskaya melted the door of a vault by raising the temperature of the metal at one point to 1100°C in fourteen seconds. Without external heat. Without explosives. The vault opened. Inside — three documents and an artefact. ORPP took them. The OPI insists Verbitskaya does not exist.
skills.desc:
Matter control — changing the state of matter by will. **[P]** — rare. INT + SP + KO.

**Includes:** changing aggregate state (water to ice, ice to vapour), changing matter properties (steel into soft metal at one point — the lock opens), creation of small amounts of matter from nothing (an OPI controversial discipline), at extreme — transmutation (a controversy at the level of «not in practice»).

skills.name: Marine Navigation
skills.note: Штурманское дело на море.
skills.vignette: When the ship «Alfa-7» got into a storm in the Kara Sea and the navigation system failed, the only seaman-navigator aboard was first mate Gromyko. Gromyko worked at the chart-table with sextant and chronometer for forty minutes — between storm pitches he caught the sun for an instant through a break in the clouds. The course was held. Three days later the ship came into Murmansk by hand-navigation. Gromyko on the bridge said: «Sextant is older than GPS by three centuries. It can be relied on.»
skills.desc:
Marine navigation without GPS. INT + PER. Differs from general Orienteering: marine is a specialised discipline with its own instruments and methods.

**Includes:** work with sextant, marine compass, magnetic declination, marine maps and charts, plotting course by current and wind, work with chronometer (for longitude), star navigation (Polaris in northern hemisphere, Southern Cross — south), reading sea conditions (currents, swells, depth changes by water colour).

**Specifics:** at low — coastal navigation. At average — oceanic without GPS. At expert — by stars without sextant. At Specialization — Suleyman ibn Ahmad in stormy nights leads through the strait by sense.

**ZPN scale:** sport-navigator ~30, mate ~50, master mariner ~70, legend ~90.

skills.name: Astronavigation
skills.note: Прокладка курсов в космосе.
skills.vignette: On the «Prometheus-2» (the OPI's experimental interplanetary ship) the on-board navigator Lev Dyomin calculated the Hohmann transfer to Mars. Not «entered the data» — personally drew up an alternative trajectory by hand, on paper, with a slide rule and a chronometer, in case the computer should fail. Twelve hours of calculation. The result coincided with the computer's to within 200 km of the destination point and 17 seconds of arrival time. Dyomin handed the table to the captain. The captain looked. «Astronomers' work in space?» he asked. «Always,» said Dyomin.
skills.desc:
Navigation in space. INT + PER. **[HT]** — for worlds with space technology. Closely linked with Astrophysics and Space Piloting — but a separate skill: the pilot pilots, the astronavigator COUNTS.

**Includes:** orbital mechanics (Hohmann, bi-elliptic, gravitational slingshot), interplanetary navigation, astronomical orientation (against the background of the celestial sphere), accounting for solar wind and gravitational perturbations, computer modelling of trajectories, manual calculation in the event of computer failure (Apollo 13).

**Specifics:** at low — orbital corrections. At average — interplanetary trajectory by computer. At expert — manual calculation of a trajectory under emergency. At Specialization — Lev Dyomin manually calculating a Hohmann transfer in 12 hours with paper.

**ZPN scale:** trained ~50, experienced ~70, master ~90+.

skills.name: Cartography
skills.note: Составление и чтение карт. КО — для точности рисунка.
skills.vignette: Wang Shi, blind master cartographer, drew the relief map of the Archipelago by touch. His fingers felt the difference in 0.1 mm in the relief — accurate to the thinness of the lines, the angles of the slopes, the depths of the bays. The map became canonical for the Eternal City's flotilla: the captains studied by it from then on. Wang Shi had not seen the Archipelago. He had felt it through his hands.
skills.desc:
Cartography — making and reading maps.

**Includes:** topographic maps, sea charts, tactical maps, projections (Mercator, gnomonic), scale and accuracy, compilation by sources (aerial photography, field measurement, satellite), reading symbols and contour lines, drawing routes, calculating distances and elevations, drawing combat-zone maps.

**Specifics:** at low — reads a topographic map. At average — draws by ground survey. At expert — drafts maps for operations. At Specialization — Wang Shi made relief maps by touch better than computers.

**ZPN scale:** beginner ~30, professional ~50, master ~70, Wang Shi ~90+.
